title: Godrej Nature's Basket is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Godrej Nature's Basket is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Godrej Nature's Basket is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Godrej Nature's Basket:
Godrej Nature's Basket is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Nature's Basket!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
